mapper.select: select settlement_id settlementId, settlement_no settlementNo, platform_code platformCode, platform_name platformName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, period_code periodCode, bill_start_date billStartDate, bill_end_date billEndDate, income_amount incomeAmount, refund_amount refundAmount, commission_fee commissionFee, payment_fee paymentFee, ad_fee adFee, service_fee serviceFee, freight_fee freightFee, other_fee otherFee, receivable_amount receivableAmount, received_amount receivedAmount, diff_amount diffAmount, settlement_status settlementStatus, reconcile_status reconcileStatus from fin_platform_settlement where settlement_no = #{settlementNo}

select receivable_id receivableId, receivable_no receivableNo, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, counterparty_name counterpartyName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, period_code periodCode, bill_amount billAmount, writeoff_amount writeoffAmount, remain_amount remainAmount, due_date dueDate, bill_status billStatus from fin_receivable_bill where receivable_no = #{receivableNo}

select payable_id payableId, payable_no payableNo, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, counterparty_name counterpartyName, period_code periodCode, bill_amount billAmount, writeoff_amount writeoffAmount, remain_amount remainAmount, due_date dueDate, bill_status billStatus from fin_payable_bill where payable_no = #{payableNo}

select cash_flow_id cashFlowId, flow_no flowNo, flow_type flowType, amount, fee_amount feeAmount, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, match_status matchStatus from fin_cash_flow where flow_no = #{flowNo}

select expense_id expenseId, expense_no expenseNo, fee_type_code feeTypeCode, fee_type_name feeTypeName, shop_id shopId, shop_name shopName, sku_id skuId, sku_code skuCode, order_no orderNo, supplier_id supplierId, supplier_name supplierName, period_code periodCode, expense_amount expenseAmount, tax_amount taxAmount, total_amount totalAmount, allocation_dimension allocationDimension, expense_status expenseStatus, occurred_date occurredDate from fin_expense_bill where expense_no = #{expenseNo}

select fee_type_id feeTypeId, fee_code feeCode, fee_name feeName, fee_category feeCategory, default_subject_code defaultSubjectCode, allocate_rule allocateRule from fin_fee_type where fee_code = #{feeCode}

select voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, period_code periodCode, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, debit_amount debitAmount, credit_amount creditAmount, voucher_status voucherStatus from fin_voucher where voucher_no = #{voucherNo}

select voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, period_code periodCode, source_type sourceType, source_no sourceNo, debit_amount debitAmount, credit_amount creditAmount, voucher_status voucherStatus from fin_voucher where source_type = #{sourceType} and source_no = #{sourceNo} limit 1

select entry_id entryId, voucher_id voucherId, voucher_no voucherNo, entry_seq entrySeq, subject_code subjectCode, subject_name subjectName, direction, amount, shop_id shopId, sku_id skuId, counterparty_name counterpartyName, summary from fin_voucher_entry where voucher_no = #{voucherNo} order by entry_seq

select s.settlement_no settlementNo, s.receivable_amount expectedAmount, coalesce(sum(case when cf.cash_flow_id is null then 0 else cf.amount end), 0.00) actualAmount from fin_platform_settlement s left join fin_receivable_bill rb on rb.source_type = 'settlement' and rb.source_no = s.settlement_no left join fin_cash_flow cf on (cf.source_type = 'settlement' and cf.source_no = s.settlement_no) or (cf.source_type = 'receivable' and cf.source_no = rb.receivable_no) where s.period_code = #{periodCode} and s.shop_id = #{shopId} group by s.settlement_no, s.receivable_amount order by s.settlement_no

select (select count(1) from fin_platform_settlement where period_code = #{periodCode} and settlement_status = 'draft') draftSettlementCount, (select count(1) from fin_platform_settlement where period_code = #{periodCode} and reconcile_status != 'matched') unmatchedSettlementCount, (select count(1) from fin_cash_flow where date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') = #{periodCode} and match_status = 'unmatched') unmatchedCashCount, (select count(1) from fin_voucher where period_code = #{periodCode} and voucher_status != 'posted') draftVoucherCount, (select count(1) from fin_receivable_bill where period_code = #{periodCode} and bill_status != 'settled') openReceivableCount, (select count(1) from fin_payable_bill where period_code = #{periodCode} and bill_status != 'settled') openPayableCount
mapper.insert: insert into fin_platform_settlement( settlement_no, platform_code, platform_name, shop_id, shop_name, period_code, bill_start_date, bill_end_date, income_amount, refund_amount, commission_fee, payment_fee, ad_fee, service_fee, freight_fee, other_fee, receivable_amount, received_amount, diff_amount, settlement_status, reconcile_status, source_file, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{settlementNo}, #{platformCode}, #{platformName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{periodCode}, #{billStartDate}, #{billEndDate}, coalesce(#{incomeAmount}, 0.00), coalesce(#{refundAmount}, 0.00), coalesce(#{commissionFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{paymentFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{adFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{serviceFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{freightFee}, 0.00), coalesce(#{otherFee}, 0.00), #{receivableAmount}, #{receivedAmount}, #{diffAmount}, #{settlementStatus}, #{reconcileStatus}, #{sourceFile}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_platform_settlement set settlement_status = 'confirmed', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where settlement_no = #{settlementNo}

update fin_platform_settlement set received_amount = #{receivedAmount}, diff_amount = #{diffAmount}, reconcile_status = #{reconcileStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where settlement_no = #{settlementNo}

update fin_receivable_bill set writeoff_amount = writeoff_amount + #{writeoffAmount}, remain_amount = #{remainAmount}, bill_status = #{billStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where receivable_no = #{billNo}
update fin_cash_flow set source_type = #{sourceType}, source_no = #{sourceNo}, match_status = 'matched', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where flow_no = #{flowNo}
mapper.insert: insert into fin_expense_bill( expense_no, fee_type_code, fee_type_name, shop_id, shop_name, sku_id, sku_code, order_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, period_code, expense_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, allocation_dimension, expense_status, occurred_date, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{expenseNo}, #{feeTypeCode}, #{feeTypeName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{skuId}, #{skuCode}, #{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{periodCode}, #{expenseAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{allocationDimension}, #{expenseStatus}, #{occurredDate}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update fin_expense_bill set expense_status = 'approved', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where expense_no = #{expenseNo}

update fin_payable_bill set writeoff_amount = writeoff_amount + #{writeoffAmount}, remain_amount = #{remainAmount}, bill_status = #{billStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where payable_no = #{billNo}
update fin_voucher set voucher_status = 'posted', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where voucher_no = #{voucherNo}

update fin_reconciliation_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, total_count = #{totalCount}, diff_count = #{diffCount}, finish_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{createBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId}

update fin_period_close set check_status = #{checkStatus}, order_complete = #{orderComplete}, settlement_complete = #{settlementComplete}, bank_complete = #{bankComplete}, voucher_complete = #{voucherComplete}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope}

update fin_period_close set close_status = 'closed', close_by = #{closeBy}, close_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope} and check_status = 'passed'

update fin_period_close set close_status = 'open', close_by = '', close_time = null, check_status = 'unchecked', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode} and close_scope = #{closeScope}
update fin_account_period set close_status = 'closed', close_by = #{closeBy}, close_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode}
update fin_account_period set close_status = 'open', close_by = '', close_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where period_code = #{periodCode}
